description: Substitute ground beef with venison when shopping. The household uses venison instead of ground beef.
Removed — double-protein purchasing rule was impractical at the store.
Substitute pork shoulder (pulled pork) with venison roast when shopping. The household uses venison roast instead of pork shoulder.
